string.text: The Sniper Rifle System 99 Anti-Materiel rifle is a magazine-fed semi-automatic, gas-operated sniper rifle, with exceptional accuracy and long-range capabilities, that allows for rapid follow-up shots while maintaining accuracy. Though the markings indicate the use of a 14.5?114mm ammunition, someone managed to modify the weapon to fire .50 BMG rounds. It's equipped with a high-powered scope, enabling precise targeting of distant adversaries with ease. This versatile rifle incorporates a semi-automatic firing mechanism, allowing .\n It repeatedly bears the brand of a "UNSC" that you somehow suspect doesn't stand for the United Nations Security Council, and Misriah Armory, a new company that only started presenting their first prototypes, though none of a sniper rifle this big or advanced, and the scope's providence is just as mysterious. Nimble is as clueless as you are, simply stating a contact found it somewhere deep in the Zone.
Magazine for the SRS99 Anti Material rifle. Houses 4 .50 BMG rounds.\n\n
Extended magazine for the SRS99 Anti Material rifle. Houses 9 .50 BMG rounds.\n\n
